source_file: Chinese Recipes.csv + Chinese Recipes - Finished Recipe.csv

methodology.allergens: Derived using cloud-kitchen aggregator taxonomy (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Flagged only when ingredient is unambiguously an allergen source — no speculative tagging. Recipes without allergen sources marked ['NO_ALLERGENS'].
methodology.calories: Estimated from ingredient qty × USDA/standard per-100g values. Wastage not applied. Rounded to integer. Estimates only — verify with lab testing for regulatory labeling.

changelog.change: Initial extraction from Chinese Recipes.csv; parsed 22 semi-finished components, enriched with essential-only allergens and computed calories_per_100g.

changelog.note: Extracted finished recipes from sibling CSV and merged with existing SF components.

changelog.entry: Added 2 missing SF components (Fried Shrimp Base-SF, Beef Strips-SF) with chef-reconstructable defaults. Fixed kcal + allergens on Chk Spring Rolls 8pc (440 kcal) and Veg Spring Rolls 8pc (400 kcal) using standard commercial per-piece spec.
Drift fix: methodology converted from string to standard dict {allergens, calories, wastage_pct}.

pending_decisions: Oyster sauce Fish+Molluscs dual-flag: kept per Chinese mapping brief (oyster sauce contains fish-derived traces in many commercial brands; flag both to be safe).
Cooking Oil treated as neutral vegetable oil (884 kcal/100g, no Peanuts flag) since brand/type not specified. If actually peanut oil, Peanuts would be required.

semi_finished_components.notes: Reconstructed 2026-04-24 from standard Chinese technique for missing SF reference. User to confirm with chef — quantities are starting-point defaults.
